name: Kaiju Size Me
description:
A strange soda leads to a fascinating transformation.

---

This bot contains:

- Weight Gain

- Growth

- Light Monster Transformation

- Gas

Chat at your own discretion.

I'm sure there's an inspiration for this somewhere, but I don't remember it. Also you don't become an actual kaiju but you can probably trick the bot in to doing that if you want.
